scripts.build: npm run frontend:install && npm run frontend:build && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.copy:frontend: rm -rf backend/public/frontend && mkdir -p backend/public/frontend && cp -R frontend/dist/. backend/public/frontend/
scripts.server: cd backend && bundle exec rails server -p ${PORT:-3000}
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run server" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && SERVE_SPA=true npm run server
